title: Picasso
description: Transform your world with many new building blocks.
body:
By downloading Picasso, you'll have access to over 80 NEW BLOCKS AND ITEMS to transform your bland and uninteresting Minecraft worlds into vibrant and thriving works of art. With much needed block variants, such as dripstone stairs, walls, and slabs, as well as a complete overhaul of calcite, I'm sure there is at least one thing in this mod that could benefit you. Also, are your walls feeling a bit bland? No worries! I have _painstakenly_ added 16 new wallpapers, fabric, mosaics for other types of woods, new carved pumpkins, and a new painting! And just in case that isn't enough, crack open a spinel geode to find insane purple rocks, or craft the two new music discs made by your’s truly. Or maybe, even live in the end with its new foliage, purpurite, and moths. If this mod seems like it could benefit you, download Picasso today! 
![The logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d096e604d27ebb7ab5a3c38b5955782fb94ad0f7.png)
(This scentance right here is to confirm I would like my mod to be removed from a site, and it will be removed, hopefully, shortly.)
